channel.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Unofficial clients

  • Linux - PlaidChatstars487
  • Linux - ScudCloudstars1.2k
  • Windows - SlackUIstars91

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Integrations

Python

  • slacksocketstars61 - Python interface to the Slack RTM API

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

PHP

  • slack-wordpressstars44 - Wordpress integration for Slack

    • Third-party services

  • Atlassian Stash - Send notifications to a Slack channel when a repo push occurs

    • Integrations

    JavaScript

  • nasa-slack - a slack integration to post the nasa photo of the day
  • skynetstars5 - A framework for slack bots
  • slackihookstars4 - Send incoming webhooks to Slack with Node.js

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Third-party services

  • Graylog2stars111 - Send log alerts to Slack
  • Drupal - Send messages from a Drupal website to Slack
  • Wordpress Plugin: Slack - Send notifications to Slack when events occur in WordPress

    • Integrations

    JavaScript

  • slack-brewbotstars9 - Whose turn is it to make a brew? Let BrewBot decide
  • slack-issue-tracker-parserstars6 (II) - A Google Chrome extension to turn issues numbers into links to the issue on an issue tracker
  • SlackChannelTrafficIndicatorstars3 - Chrome extension that plots the traffic in Slack channels
  • slackdrawstars11 - A Google Chrome extension to draw and share the drawings on Slack

    • Integrations

    Python

  • ellie-slackstars88 - Eliza's younger, hipper, psychobabble-friendly successor as a Slackbot
  • errbotstars2.5k - A plugin-based chatbot designed to be easily deployable, extensible and maintainable
  • slack-emojisstars143 - images for custom Slack emojis

    • Integrations

    Ruby

  • slack-webistranostars5 - Send Webistrano deploys to Slack
  • fastlanestars31.8k - iOS deployment workflow that posts notifications to Slack
  • pagerbotstars276 - Manage Pagerduty on-call schedules from within your internal chat channels
  • slackistranostars371 - Send Capistrano deployment messages to Slack

    • Integrations

    CoffeeScript

  • jinorastars86 - Slack webhook app to create anonymous public channels

    • Integrations

    Haskell

  • jpgtobotstars19 - jpg.to bot for Slack

    • Integrations

    PHP

  • GifBotstars72 - Random GIF generator for your Slack channels
  • notifymestars165 - Provides a common interface for notification services
  • rocketeer-slackstars28 - Slack plugin for Rocketeer
  • SlackAgainstHumanitystars75 - A laravel 5 package for playing Cards Against Humanity in your Slack channel

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2015
item.description:
Third-party services

  • Datadog - Send notifications to slack when alerts trigger, and share graphs with your colleagues in chat.

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

Python

  • slack-workoutstars574 - A fun hack that gets Slackbot to force your teammates to work out!

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2015
item.description:
Third-party services

  • Slack Slash Commands as a Service - Useful tools and API integrations through slash commands.

    • Integrations

    Python

  • sscaasstars46 - Slack Slash Commands as a Service

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • slack-poker-botstars1.6k - A bot that deals Texas Hold'em games in Slack

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

Ruby

  • slack-ruby-botstars49 - The easiest way to write a Slack bot in Ruby
  • slack-ruby-clientstars16 - A Ruby client for the Slack Web and RealTime Messaging APIs

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • slack-pollsstars12 - Express.js app for native polling on Slack

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • slackWeatherBot.js - A world weather bot using the Yahoo Weather API and Node.js

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • good-slackstars14 - Slack Webhook message posting for Good process monitor

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

Go

  • worktile-events-to-slackstars12 - Forward Worktile events to Slack

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • slackarmastars7 - Give your teammates reputation points in Slack
  • slack-bot-apistars1.3k - Simple way to control your Slack Bot
  • browser-node-slackstars2 - Slack integration for node and browserify
  • hublin-slack-integrationstars4 - Integrate Hubl.in with Slack
  • imma-let-you-finishstars45 - A bot that randomly appears in your conversation to tell everyone who has the best comment of all times
  • slack-chat - A support chat feature for your website that integrates with Slack
  • slack-clistars284 - A command line interface for Slack using node
  • slack-currencystars19 - Slash command for converting currency
  • slack-harveststars124 - Send a daily Slack message with a list of tracked time from Harvest
  • slack-irc-pluginstars71 - Sync IRC with your Slack account
  • slack-pongbotstars79 - Slack bot for ping pong tracking
  • slack-tableflipstars21 - A tableflip slash command
  • slack-textsstars19 - Receive SMS notifications in Slack using Twilio
  • slackapi-angularjsstars27 - AngularJS module wrapper for the Slack Web API
  • slackboxstars554 - Spotify playlist collaboration through Slack
  • slackeystars30 - A JavaScript SDK for the Slack API
  • SnooBotstars0 - Look up information about Reddit subs
  • terminal-slackstars1k - Terminal client for Slack

    • Third-party services

  • Slacker - Post funny replies to Slack as your favourite character
  • Slack Message Builder - A tool for previewing how JSON payloads translate to Slack messages
  • Wordpress Plugin: Caldera Forms Slack Integration - Get notifications in Slack whenever a Caldera Form is submitted
  • Wordpress Plugin: bbPress Slack - Send notifications of new bbPress topics and replies to Slack

    • Integrations

    C#

  • margiebot - A .NET library designed to make building bots for Slack fast, easy, and fun
  • mmbotstars237 - a C# port of hubot, with Slack support
  • svn-slack-notifierstars25 - A simple app to send VisualSVN Server commit notifications to Slack

    • Integrations

    Clojure

  • clj-slack-clientstars7 - A Clojure client for the Slack RTM and Web APIs
  • lunch-botstars27 - A Slack bot that manages group lunch activities

    • Integrations

    CoffeeScript

  • slack-api-clientstars12 - A Slack API client for node.js

    • Integrations

    Go

  • anonymous-slackstars19 - A service you can run on Heroku to send anonymous messages to colleagues
  • marvinstars25 - Slack bot written in Go
  • slacker-newsstars4 - Slack integration that reports current news items
  • SlackMSstars8 - SMS your team channel in Slack
  • slackrusstars79 - Slack hook for Logrus

    • Integrations

    Java

  • slack-client - Displays a Slack unread icon in the system tray
  • stash2slack - Send Stash server events as notifications to Slack

    • Integrations

    Lua

  • breezBotstars5 - Air quality index bot for Slack using the breezometer API

    • Integrations

    PHP

  • jira-slack-phpstars20 - JIRA-Slack Integration in PHP
  • MantisBT-Slackstars46 - MantisBT plugin to send bug updates to Slack
  • Slackerstars547 - Simple Slack client for the CLI

    • Integrations

    Python

  • django-slack-oauthstars48 - Slack OAuth module for Django
  • reach-slack-rtmstars17 - Simple Slack RTM chat built with ReactJS and Django
  • scudcloudstars1.2k - Ubuntu client for Slack
  • slack-overflowstars828 - Search Stack Overflow right from within Slack
  • slack_standup_snitchstars3 - A Slack bot that counts the days each user was active on a channel, calling out the inactive users
  • slackbridgestars27 - Bridge Slack channels between companies

    • Integrations

    Ruby

  • slack-gamebotstars127 - A game bot for Slack
  • slackbotsstars29 - A bunch of rad slackbots that run on IronWorker
  • spoilerbotstars1 - Displays a random card from the latest Magic: The Gathering set
  • squirt - Upload a file to a Slack channel from the cli

    • Integrations

    Scala

  • slack-scala-clientstars176 - A Scala Slack client for the Web and RTM API

    • Integrations

    Shell

  • Sholat-Prayer-Times-Slack - Salat Prayer Times bot for Slack integration

    • Integrations

    Tcl

  • eggdrop-slackstars5 - Simple Message Relay from IRC to Slack

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack May 25th - May 31st, 2015
item.description:
Integrations

JavaScript

  • node-slack-ircstars14 - Node.js solution to integrate IRC chats to Slack

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2015
item.description:
Themes

  • Sweet Themes are Made of These - site for sharing Slack custom palettes
  • Slackthemes - A Slack sidebar theme browser

    • Integrations

    JavaScript

  • generator-slack-commandstars8 - Yeoman generator to create a simple Slack slash command server
  • slack-moviestars14 - slack command for getting movie info
  • bip-pod-slackstars3 - Slack Pod for BipIO
  • bitbucket-slack-pr-hookstars63 - Receive Pull Request notifications from BitBucket and send them to Slack
  • brackets-slacksnippetstars9 - push code snippets from Brackets to a slack channel
  • bunyan-slackstars73 - Bunyan stream for Slack chat integration
  • camayak-to-slackstars1 - Node.js app that allows Slack to work as a Camayak publishing destination
  • chivebotstars8 - A pluggable Slack bot based on Outgoing Webhooks
  • CircleCI2Slack - Node app that proxies build notifications from CircleCI to Slack
  • crispyfistars127 - A local pseudo-bot that controls Spotify through Slack
  • cylebot-slackstars2 - Cylebot, but for Slack
  • ExceptionalIO2Slack - Send exceptions from Exceptional.io to Slack
  • gif-botstars5 - A Gif Bot for Slack
  • giphyslackstars4 - Giphy integration for Slack built in node.js
  • grunt-alertstars8 - Sends alerts about failing builds using different channels
  • grunt-slack-hookstars26 - Grunt plugin to send messages to Slack
  • irc-slack-echostars44 - Echoes IRC activity to Slack, and supports IRC/Slack username mapping
  • Live-WorldCup-Notification-for-Slackstars20 - World Cup 2014 notifications
  • LOUDBOT-SLACKstars33 - LOUDBOT FOR SLACK
  • node-slack-clistars23 - Send messages to Slack from the command line with nodejs
  • node-slackbotstars27 - Slackbot for node.js using RTM API
  • node-slackhookstars21 - A node module for Slack custom hooks
  • node-slackrstars71 - A node.js library for sending messages to Slack
  • nodebot-slackstars2 - A Node.js bot for Slack teams
  • Notifications for Fluid - Use native notification center for Slack in fluid.app
  • Overcaststars454 - A SSH-based cloud management CLI with Slack support
  • passport-slackstars102 - Slack OAuth2 strategy for Passport
  • Send-to-Slackstars362 - A plugin for Sketch.app to share artboards to Slack
  • slack-alias-pluginstars18 - Auto-expand mentions of certain aliases to their respective users
  • slack-apistars44 - a javascript wrapper for the Slack API
  • slack-assembla-pluginstars4 - Watches Slack channels for messages about Assembla and acts accordingly
  • slack-bill-sharingstars2 - Bill sharing bot for Slack
  • slack-btcstars2 - Simple node.js REST API to add a BTC ticker to Slack
  • slack-clickystars49 - Chrome Extension that lets you share links to Slack in a single click
  • slack-dndstars33 - D&D slash commands for Slack
  • slack-emoji-randomizerstars6 - replace emoji in your messages with random emoji
  • slack-githubstars14 - Post github commits to Slack
  • slack-integrations - The Collective Digital Studio Slack integration server
  • slack-integratorstars1 - Easily integrate Slack with your apps!
  • slack-invite - Invite people to your awesome slack group
  • slack-ircstars589 - Connects Slack and IRC channels by sending messages back and forth
  • slack-jira-pluginstars253 - Watches Slack channels for messages about JIRA and acts accordingly
  • slack-memestars16 - Slack meme integration
  • slack-middle-serverstars0 - Intermediate webhook server for Slack
  • slack-newsstars125 - Read news from multiple sources within Slack by just typing /news
  • slack-notifystars216 - A Node.js wrapper around the Slack Webhook API
  • slack-pokemonstars340 - A bot for having Pokemon battles in Slack
  • slack-proxystars10 - Simple proxy between AWS SQS queue and Slack
  • slack-reply-shortcutstars3 - Use the "R" shortcut key w/ selected text to easily reply in the web app
  • slack-stuartstars93 - An extendable bot server for Slack
  • Slack-Twitterstars47 - Node.js middleware to create a reading and writing Twitter client out of Slack
  • slack-webex-plugin - Launch a Webex Personal Room or other type of meeting from Slack
  • slack-yandex-api - Simple server app for Yandex API and Slack integration
  • slack.com.jsstars4 - Google Chrome extension to make emoticons look better
  • slackbot-saysstars8 - Chrome extension to post messages to Slack as Slackbot
  • slackbotapistars135 - node.js Slack RTM API module
  • slackin - Public Slack organizations made easy
  • slacklinkstars20 - Post links to Slack from Chrome
  • slackr-botstars12 - A node module for making bots that use the Slack RTM API
  • slacktappdstars13 - A tiny little app to post Untappd checkins to Slack
  • slacktocracystars4 - A tiny little app to post Fitocracy workouts to Slack
  • SlackTogglestars0 - Chrome extension to collapse/expand a Slack discussion section
  • slackusstars23 - New Disqus comment notifier for Slack
  • SlackVotestars39 - Slack integration that allows team members to vote
  • slackWeather.js - Slack slackbot send weather forecast
  • Slotifystars2 - Slack plugin that returns top 5 tracks of an artist
  • spotify-playlist-2-slackstars14 - Share updates to a Spotify playlist in Slack
  • step-slack-notifystars2 - Send a message to Slack after a build or deploy
  • strider-slackstars5 - Slack Incoming Webhooks as a Strider-CD plugin
  • superscriptstars1.6k - A dialogue engine for creating chat bots
  • swolebotstars53 - A Slack bot for keeping your team fit through open pull requests
  • tesla-slackstars25 - Track your Tesla from Slack

    • Lists

  • awesome-open-slackstars22 - repository of Slack open team list
  • Community-built integrations

    • Integrations

    C

  • PebbleSlackstars25 - A Slack app for Pebble

    • Integrations

    C++

  • slack-integrationsstars8 - Custom Slack integration scripts

    • Integrations

    C#

  • Cake.Slackstars1 - Cake AddIn that extends Cake with Slack messaging features
  • CCNetSlackPublisherstars12 - Slack integration with CruiseControl.NET
  • Log4Slackstars70 - simple, asynchronous Slack log4net appender
  • Slack-Contourstars1 - Umbraco Contour workflow item that allows you to post the form data to a Slack channel
  • Slack.Webhooksstars147 - Even simpler integration with Slack's Incoming / Outgoing webhooks
  • SlackAPIstars392 - Full Slack API library, including WebSockets
  • SlackCommanderstars23 - Useful (?) slash commands and miscellaneous integrations for Slack
  • SqlServerSlackAPIstars27 - A SQL Server CLR assembly for direct communication with Slack via TSQL
  • TfsNotificationRelaystars119 - A plugin for TFS 2013 that sends notifications to Slack
  • TSJ.Gemini.Slackstars3 - Posts issue changes to a channel in Slack
  • WooCode.Slackstars23 - Library for slacking with Slack.com in .Net
  • workfront-to-slackstars3 - Checks for updates from a workfront team and pushes them to a Slack channel

    • Integrations

    Clojure

  • clj-slackstars121 - Use Slack REST API from Clojure
  • markov-chainzstars4 - A Markov chain bot written in Clojure
  • slack-hooksstars20 - Papertrail's collection of webhook receivers for Slack
  • slack.clj - Example of sending a message to Slack from Clojure
  • slacksstars1 - Deliver quotes to a Slack channel

    • Integrations

    CoffeeScript

  • bugsnag-notification-pluginsstars12 - Notification plugins for Bugsnag error tracker
  • gifmaticstars14 - Search Giphy and send a matching image back to Slack
  • hubot-basecampstars13 - Expands Basecamp URLs in chat with more useful information
  • humorsstars5 - Custom Hubot
  • pr2slackstars8 - Non-spammy pull request messages
  • slack-node-sdkstars167 - Slack Node SDK with Webhook and API support
  • slacker - Meteor-based API for Slack commands

    • Integrations

    Dart

  • dart-slackstars15 - Dart interface to the Webhook API

    • Integrations

    Erlang

  • slackerstars53 - Erlang Slack REST API wrapper

    • Integrations

    Go

  • amiando-slackstars0 - Push Amiando ticket sales to Slack
  • circle2slackstars1 - Proxy CircleCI webhooks to Slack
  • enotify-slackstars40 - A tool to get event information and send it to Slack
  • gdrive2slackstars88 - Frictionless integration between Google Drive and Slack
  • go-botstars22 - IRC bot written in go
  • halstars282 - A chat bot in Go
  • hipchat-notifications-to-slackstars18 - forward notifications from HipChat to Slack
  • phoenixstars23 - Pluggable bot for Slack
  • rmslackstars4 - Purge a slack channel of all messages
  • slackstars8 - Slack API in Go
  • slack_auth_proxystars17 - A reverse proxy providing authentication via a slack.com team
  • slack-clistars13 - A command tool to communicate with Slack
  • slack-fingerbumpbotstars5 - A bot for Slack that never leaves a finger bump hanging
  • slack-markovstars56 - A markov chain bot for your Slack channel
  • slack-oldbotstars15 - A bot for Slack that politely reports when a link has been used before in the channel
  • slack-upvotestars19 - Slack voting integration
  • slackbot - A silly little slackhq robot
  • slackbotstars247 (II) - Framework for building slash commands for Slack
  • slackcatstars142 - Post messages to Slack from the command line
  • slackline - Create a Slack channel shared by two organizations
  • slackline-gaestars0 - Google App Engine app to share channels between Slack accounts
  • slacktogostars28 - Slack Integration Server for distributing channels between different Slack teams
  • webhookstars6.5k - Easily run commands in response to HTTP webhook requests from Slack

    • Integrations

    Groovy

  • slack-ozfindbizstars0 - Outgoing WebHook Integration to search for Australian businesses and POIs

    • Integrations

    Haskell

  • hi5botstars20 - Get and give high-fives on Slack
  • slackstars32 - A Haskell client for the Slack web API

    • Integrations

    Java

  • AcraSlackstars10 - Sample project for Android Studio showing how to implement ACRA and Slack integration
  • gitblit-slack-pluginstars5 - Post Gitblit events to a Slack channel
  • rundeck-slack-incoming-webhook-pluginstars64 - A Rundeck Plugin for Slack Incoming WebHooks
  • rundeck-slack-pluginstars34 - A Rundeck Plugin for Slack
  • simple-slack-apistars465 - A Slack client library in Java
  • SlackMCstars60 - Bukkit/Bungee plugin for Slack
  • slack-for-confluence - Confluence updates in Slack
  • slack-webhookstars174 - Slack WebHook Integration for Java
  • tcSlackBuildNotifierstars319 - Post TeamCity build notifications to Slack

    • Integrations

    Lua

  • Lua Slackstars13 - A Lua Slack API wrapper
  • lubotstars16 - Lua Chatbot running inside OpenResty
  • uberSlackBotstars31 - Get Uber price estimates directly in Slack

    • Integrations

    Matlab

  • SlackMatlabstars19 - Basic integration for Slack notifications for Matlab

    • Integrations

    OCaml

  • slackostars64 - A neat interface for Slack

    • Integrations

    Perl

  • slack-integrationsstars30 - Scripts to integrate Slack with subversion and nagios
  • slappyhourstars12 - A CGI script to bridge a channel between multiple Slack instances

    • Integrations

    PHP

  • AlfredSlackSearchstars36 - Alfred.app workflow that searches your team's Slack history
  • Archibaldstars11 - A Slack integration to post GIF replies from replygif.net
  • beanstalk-slackstars5 - Integrates your deploy commits from Beanstalk directly into Slack
  • CLSlackBundlestars46 - Symfony bundle that lets you interact with the Slack API and webhooks
  • ExceptionHandlerstars14 - PHP Exception Handler to post exceptions to a Slack channel
  • Gifbotstars21 - GIFs for your Slack channel
  • make-it-rainstars308 - Animated gif notifications whenever you get paid through Stripe
  • mediawiki-slackstars39 - Mediawiki integration for Slack
  • monologstars18.7k - Sends your logs to Slack
  • opauth-slackstars1 - Slack authentication strategy for Opauth
  • phlackstars53 - PHP API Wrapper
  • php-slackstars132 - A lightweight PHP implementation of Slack's API
  • PHP-Slack - PHP API Wrapper with Laravel support
  • php-slack-error-reporterstars9 - Library to report errors to slack.
  • pslackrstars8 - Library for sending messages from your app to Slack
  • redmine-commandstars19 - Redmine-Slack integration to manage issues
  • Shookerstars19 - Slack WebHooks PHP Class
  • Slackstars1.2k - Laravel 4 package for sending messages to Slack
  • slack-apistars34 - A super simple wrapper for the Slack API
  • slack-notifierstars61 - Simple PHP wrapper for Slack notifications
  • slack-sdk - PHP SDK
  • slack-teastars8 - Decide who makes the tea using Slack
  • slack-webhooks - Easily add service with webhooks integration in Slack
  • SlackBundlestars39 - SlackBundle for Symfony2
  • slackcampstars67 - Post Basecamp events to Slack
  • SlackGooglestars16 - Slash command that returns a Google search URL, like LMGTFY
  • SlackHelperstars5 - Object-oriented classes for sending data to Slack via incoming webhooks
  • SlackHolidayBotstars11 - Posts today's holiday to a channel in Slack
  • slackuntappdstars15 - A webhook that allows you to search for beer information within Slack via Untappd
  • SlackWampstars6 - A WAMP wrapper for the Slack API
  • Sqwackstars15 - Semi-realtime profile photos in Slack
  • tourdefrance-slack-botstars15 - Notifies a Slack channel/group for every stage during the Tour de France 2014
  • versioneye-slackstars6 - Post VersionEye notifications to Slack
  • VoiceChatAPI slack command - Create a VoiceChatAPI room from Slack
  • wordpress-slack-notifier-plugin - Sends post published notifications to Slack
  • worldcup-slack-botstars31 - Notify a Slack channel for every match during the 2014 World Cup

    • Integrations

    Python

  • asterisk-slackstars13 - Publishes Asterisk call information to Slack
  • butterfieldstars7 - Python Slack bot framework using asyncio and Slack's RTM API
  • changetip-slackstars30 - ChangeTip Slack Tip bot
  • django-slackstars212 - Slack integration for Django, using the templating engine to generate messages
  • flask-slackstars84 - Flask extension which makes it easy to interact with Slack slash commands
  • fs-slackstars9 - Silly slash command synthesis for Slack
  • gmail2slackstars28 - Send a Slack notification whenever a new gmail arrives
  • limbostars387 - A simple, clean, easy-to-modify Slack chatbot
  • morgenbotstars226 - A standup bot for Slack
  • mqttwarnstars842 - Notify Slack from MQTT
  • opendutystars780 - An open source alerting and incident escalation tool
  • pyslackstars147 - Python API Wrapper
  • python-rtmbotstars679 - A Slack bot written in Python that connects to the RTM API
  • python-slack.com - Python classes for integrating with Slack
  • python-slackclientstars3.1k (pypi) - A basic client for Slack, which can optionally connect to the RTM API
  • relaystars10 - Bare-bones continuous integration using Docker Hub and Slack
  • slackstars94 - A simple and comprehensive Slack API client
  • slack-echo-chamberstars7 - Crosspost messages from one channel into another
  • slack-imgurstars20 - A random image from Imgur to Slack
  • slack-w3wstars10 - Slack Webhook for linking to What3Words
  • slack-zenossstars4 - A Slack incoming webhook to show events from Zenoss
  • slackardstars42 - A bot for Slack
  • slackbotstars1.2k - A chat bot for Slack
  • slackbot-pythonstars52 - A Slack.com bot in Python integrated with Amazon SQS
  • slackcmdstars20 - A Python script for piping output from the command line to a Slack channel
  • slackcraftstars1 - Slask based WoW bot for Slack
  • slackerstars1.6k - Slack API Wrapper for Python
  • slacker-clistars172 - Messages to slack from the command line
  • slackfred - Interact with Slack via Alfred
  • slackotronstars12 - A Slack bot customizable via plugins
  • slackpystars22 - Slack client library for specific logging
  • slouchstars71 - Lightweight Python framework for building cli-inspired Slack bots
  • StackStorm Slack Pack - Pack which allows integration with Slack service.
  • sublime-slack-integrationstars72 - Post to Slack from Sublime Text 3
  • tracslack - Trac notifications for Slack
  • webhook-bridgestars9 - micro-service to convert webhook POST formats including Slack
  • wee-slackstars2.2k - A WeeChat plugin for Slack

    • Integrations

    R

  • slackrstars274 - A package to send webhook API messages to Slack channels/users from R

    • Integrations

    Ruby

  • addon-slackstars2 - Send MagnumCI build notifications to Slack
  • adventure-botstars13 - Text adventures in Slack!
  • airbrake2slack - Airbrake to Slack integration (through Heroku)
  • Alfred-Slack-Channelsstars28 - Alfred WorkFlow to Switch Slack Channels
  • beachstars13 - Small Sinatra app to host web hooks for Slack
  • capistrano-slackstars70 - Send Capistrano deployment messages to Slack
  • capistrano-slackstars8 (II) - Send Capistrano deployment messages to Slack
  • capistrano-slackifystars80 - Send Capistrano deployment messages to Slack
  • chef-slackstars36 - Cookbook to send messages to Slack
  • chef-slack_handlerstars11 - Chef handler for Slack
  • dogetip-slackstars10 - Sinatra app to enable Dogecoin tipping via slack
  • doorbell-serverstars18 - Simple Sinatra app which acts a bridge between Slack and the LMN doorbell
  • gifbotstars35 - Integrated animated GIF search for Slack
  • hatebu-hookerstars5 - Post Hatena::Bookmark to Slack
  • kickslackerstars5 - Post progress updates on a kickstarter project to Slack
